name: QNI : Embedded Script Detected
notes: This rule triggers when an embedded script has been detected inside a file observed on the network. This might include macros in Office documents or JavaScript embedded in PDF files.
conditions_text: when any of Suspect Content Descriptions match script
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Embedded Script Detected on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of Suspect Content Descriptions match script
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Embedded Script Detected
Event description: Detects when an embedded script has been observed inside a file observed on the network
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
